summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 and REQ-2. GameScene.tsx initializes isPaused as false so no pause overlay is shown on game start, ESC toggles pause only during active gameplay, PauseOverlay is reused and rendered conditionally, and useWaveSystem.ts skips countdown/cleared ticks when paused. FirstPersonCamera.tsx also respects isPaused for mouse look and movement. All core acceptance criteria appear to be addressed.
